name: python3-tinydb
title: python3-tinydb
description:
document oriented database optimized
TinyDB is a tiny, document oriented database optimized
for your happiness :) It's written in pure Python and
has no external requirements. The target are small apps
that would be blown away by a SQL-DB or an external
database server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tinydb because document oriented database optimized.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tinydb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tinydb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tinydb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
